news.title: NCLT accepts SBI's plea to proceed against ex-Videocon MD for loan fraud.
news.summary: NCLT accepts SBI's plea to proceed against ex-Videocon MD for loan fraud.

news.title:
NCLT admits SBI's plea to initiate insolvency against former Videocon MD Dhoot in ₹6,157.6 crore fraud.
A moratorium on Dhoot's debts is imposed for 180 days; SBI aims to recover dues from his personal assets.
news.summary:
NCLT admits SBI's plea to initiate insolvency against former Videocon MD Dhoot in ₹6,157.6 crore fraud.
A moratorium on Dhoot's debts is imposed for 180 days; SBI aims to recover dues from his personal assets.

news.title:
India's remittances may hit USD 140B in FY26, stabilizing at USD 135-137B in FY27, per SBI Research.
RBI projects FY27 GDP growth at 6.9% and inflation at 4.6%, noting global uncertainties and energy price risks.
news.summary:
India's remittances may hit USD 140B in FY26, stabilizing at USD 135-137B in FY27, per SBI Research.
RBI projects FY27 GDP growth at 6.9% and inflation at 4.6%, noting global uncertainties and energy price risks.

news.title:
India's updated insolvency framework introduces pre-pack resolution for faster debt restructuring, easing NCLT burden.
SBI's ex-chairman Dinesh Khara highlights reduced delays; experts see improved recovery and asset value preservation.
news.summary:
India's updated insolvency framework introduces pre-pack resolution for faster debt restructuring, easing NCLT burden.
SBI's ex-chairman Dinesh Khara highlights reduced delays; experts see improved recovery and asset value preservation.

news.title:
SBI surpassed ICICI Bank in Q4 to become India's No.2 lender by market cap, despite a 0.3% decline to Rs 9,040.47B.
HDFC Bank retained top spot despite a 26.1% market cap drop, driven by chairman's resignation and sector-wide pressures.
news.summary:
SBI surpassed ICICI Bank in Q4 to become India's No.2 lender by market cap, despite a 0.3% decline to Rs 9,040.47B.
HDFC Bank retained top spot despite a 26.1% market cap drop, driven by chairman's resignation and sector-wide pressures.

news.title: SBI witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 15.62 crore involving 147,012 shares at Rs. 1062.2 each.
news.summary: SBI witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 15.62 crore involving 147,012 shares at Rs. 1062.2 each.

news.title:
SBI shares rose 3.5% to ₹1,066 post Q4 results; HSBC rated it a Buy.
Analysts cite strong fundamentals but note risks like deposit competition, RBI directives.
news.summary:
SBI shares rose 3.5% to ₹1,066 post Q4 results; HSBC rated it a Buy.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.

news.title:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.
news.summary:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.

news.title:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.
Key stocks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, and Axis Bank may benefit; RBI expected to hold rates at 5.25%.
news.summary:

news.title:
RBI's April 2026 policy keeps the repo rate at 5.25%, ensuring banking stability.
SBI MD Rana Ashutosh Kumar Singh discusses systemic liquidity impacts of RBI's policy.

news.title:
SC rules borrowers don't need personal hearing before loans are tagged fraud under RBI directions.
Ruling resolves conflicting high court judgments on fraud classification by banks.

news.title:
SBI faces $32M loss after unwinding $5B rupee bets due to RBI's crackdown.
RBI limits daily open currency positions to $100M; rupee down 3% YTD amid trade gap.
news.summary:
SBI faces $32M loss after unwinding $5B rupee bets due to RBI's crackdown.
